match.userMessage:
Steady handheld tracking follows Scarlett as she rises from her crouched position at the shoreline, turns toward the ocean, and wades two steps forward into the shallows. Foam swirls around her calves while the coral lipstick remains planted upright in the wet sand directly behind her. Gentle waves lap continuously at the shore, creating fresh white foam that swirls around her legs and the shoreline.

gentle ocean waves lapping on shore with soft foam sounds. footsteps splashing in shallow water, water swishing around calves.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
